summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Core 80/20 Aggressive Allocation ETF (AOA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Target Risk Aggressive index. The fund tracks a proprietary index that provides significant exposure to equities, and a small portion to fixed income securities with a goal of long-term capital appreciation. AOA was launched on Nov 4, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.
